completed_tasks.name: Validation layer — quarantine migration, validator module, bounds fixes
Alerter extension + integrate validator into all 7 pipelines
React Router v6 install + withRouter6 HOC + LandingResolver
Consumer component wrapping + browser smoke test

blockers.description: ACLED API access not granted — Phase 4 Plan 07 cannot execute
blockers.workaround: Email sent to access@acleddata.com. All other pipelines operational. ACLED cron auto-enables when credentials are uncommented in .env

blockers.description: Phase 5 (Data Coverage) depends on Phase 4 completion
blockers.workaround: Can start v2 work (TypeScript migration) independently

human_actions_pending.action: Follow up with ACLED on API access
human_actions_pending.context: Email sent to access@acleddata.com — need ACLED_EMAIL and ACLED_PASSWORD credentials
Currently using onboarding@resend.dev test domain — works for sending to owner email only

decisions.decision: Quarantine + alert pattern for bad data
decisions.rationale: Bad rows stored for review, not deleted. Email alerts with full details.

decisions.decision: Full IOM re-ingest through corrected pipeline instead of retroactive cleanup migration
decisions.rationale: IOM CSV always contains full dataset — cleaner than patching existing rows

decisions.decision: Türkiye-Europe land route remapped from Western Balkans to Eastern Mediterranean
decisions.rationale: Deep Turkey/Caucasus coords are geographically Eastern Med
Prevents circular geoFallback loops — validator quarantines UNRESOLVED rows

decisions.decision: Route bounds derived from Frontex/IOM authoritative country definitions
decisions.rationale: No published lat/lng boxes exist — derived from country extents per route

decisions.decision: Admin page removed — all ingestion automated via server-side cron
decisions.rationale: Security surface eliminated, automation is the real value

decisions.decision: TypeScript migration recommended as next v2 work
decisions.rationale: Foundation for RTL tests, better DX, doesn't depend on ACLED

decisions.decision: JSON seed files kept until ACLED access — then remove all
decisions.rationale: war_all.json (17MB) can't be replaced without ACLED API

next_action: Start v2 TypeScript migration: /gsd:discuss-phase for a new TypeScript phase, or /gsd:new-milestone for v2
context_notes: Massive session covering Phase 6 (React Router v6 migration — complete), Phase 4 validation layer (Plans 15-16 — complete), and extensive data quality work iterating on geographic bounds for all 12 migration routes. IOM re-ingested multiple times through corrected pipeline. Final state: 20,042 clean rows, 11 quarantined, 217 tests passing. User wants to move to v2 (TypeScript) while waiting for ACLED.
